glosses.ja: カーニバル; 謝肉祭

translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi lễ hội hóa trang.
translations.nl: We gaan vandaag naar het carnaval.
translations.hi: हम आज कार्निवल में जा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi drar på karneval i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kami pergi ke karnaval.
translations.sv: Vi går pada karneval i dag.
translations.da: Vi skal til karneval i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はカーニバルに行くよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb in present tense; agrees with the subject 'Wir'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb 'gehen'.
Fused preposition+article ('zu' + 'dem'); governs a dative noun phrase.
Common noun in dative singular as the complement of the preposition 'zum'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester näht Kostüme für den Fasching.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ nɛːt kɔsˈtyːmə fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈfaʃɪŋ/

translations.de: Meine Schwester näht Kostüme für den Fasching.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ nɛːt kɔsˈtyːmə fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈfaʃɪŋ/
translations.en: My sister sews costumes for carnival.
translations.es: Mi hermana cose disfraces para el carnaval.
translations.fr: Ma sœur coud des costumes pour le carnaval.
translations.it: Mia sorella cuce costumi per il carnevale.
translations.ko: 제 여동생은 카니발 의상을 직접 재봉해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹为狂欢节缝制服装。
translations.ru: Моя сестра шьёт костюмы для карнавала.
translations.pt: Minha irmã costura fantasias para o carnaval.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim karnaval için kostüm dikiyor.
translations.vi: Chị tôi may trang phục cho lễ hội hóa trang.
translations.nl: Mijn zus naait kostuums voor carnaval.
translations.uk: Моя сестра шиє костюми для карнавалу.
translations.hu: A nővérem jelmezeket varr a karneválra.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन कार्निवल के लिए पोशाकें सिलती है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra szyje kostiumy na karnawał.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου ράβει στολές για το καρναβάλι.
translations.nb: Søsteren min syr kostymer til karneval.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya menjahit kostum untuk karnaval.
translations.sv: Min syster syr kostymer till karnevalen.
translations.ro: Sora mea coase costume pentru carnaval.
translations.cs: Moje sestra šije kostýmy na karneval.
translations.da: Min søster syr kostumer til karneval.
translations.ja: 私の姉はカーニバルの衣装を縫っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative, modifying 'Schwester'.
Common noun; serves as the subject of 'näht'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Plural common noun; direct object of 'näht'.
Preposition that governs the accusative case.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular with 'Fasching'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Im Fasching trägt er immer eine Maske.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈfaʃɪŋ trɛːkt eːɐ̯ ˈɪmɐ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈmaskə/

translations.de: Im Fasching trägt er immer eine Maske.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈfaʃɪŋ trɛːkt eːɐ̯ ˈɪmɐ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈmaskə/
translations.en: During carnival he always wears a mask.
translations.es: En el carnaval siempre lleva una máscara.
translations.fr: Au carnaval, il porte toujours un masque.
translations.it: Al carnevale indossa sempre una maschera.
translations.zh-Hans: 在狂欢节上他总是戴面具。
translations.yue: 喺嘉年華佢成日戴面具。
translations.ru: На карнавале он всегда носит маску.
translations.pt: No carnaval ele sempre usa máscara.
translations.tr: Karnavalda o her zaman maske takar.
translations.vi: Trong lễ hội hóa trang, anh ấy luôn đeo mặt nạ.
translations.nl: Tijdens carnaval draagt hij altijd een masker.
translations.uk: На карнавалі він завжди носить маску.
translations.hi: कार्निवल में वह हमेशा मुखौटा पहनता है।
translations.nb: På karneval bruker han alltid maske.
translations.id: Saat karnaval dia selalu memakai topeng.
translations.sv: På karnevalen bär han alltid mask.
translations.ro: La carnaval poartă mereu o mască.
translations.da: Til karneval har han altid maske på.
translations.ja: カーニバルでは彼はいつも仮面をつける。

tokens.explanation: Fused preposition+article ('in' + 'dem'); governs a dative noun phrase.
Common noun in dative singular as complement of 'Im'; temporal prepositional phrase.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of 'trägt'.
Frequency adverb modifying 'trägt'.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular with 'Maske'.
Common noun; direct object of 'trägt'.

sentences.target: Bei uns gibt es Fasching im Februar.
sentences.reading: /baɪ̯ ʊns ɡɪpt ɛs ˈfaʃɪŋ ɪm ˈfeːbʁu̯aːɐ̯/

translations.de: Bei uns gibt es Fasching im Februar.
translations.ipa: /baɪ̯ ʊns ɡɪpt ɛs ˈfaʃɪŋ ɪm ˈfeːbʁu̯aːɐ̯/
translations.en: Where we live, carnival is in February.
translations.es: Donde vivimos, el carnaval es en febrero.
translations.fr: Chez nous, le carnaval est en février.
translations.it: Da noi il carnevale è a febbraio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们那里狂欢节在二月。
translations.yue: 我哋嗰邊嘅嘉年華喺二月。
translations.ru: У нас карнавал проходит в феврале.
translations.pt: Aqui onde moramos, o carnaval é em fevereiro.
translations.vi: Ở chỗ chúng tôi, lễ hội hóa trang diễn ra vào tháng Hai.
translations.nl: Bij ons is carnaval in februari.
translations.hi: हमारे यहाँ कार्निवल फरवरी में होता है।
translations.pl: U nas karnawał jest w lutym.
translations.el: Στον τόπο μας το καρναβάλι γίνεται τον Φεβρουάριο.
translations.nb: Hos oss er det karneval i februar.
translations.id: Di tempat kami, karnaval berlangsung pada bulan Februari.
translations.sv: Hos oss är karnevalen i februari.
translations.ro: La noi carnavalul este în februarie.
translations.cs: U nás je karneval v únoru.
translations.da: Hos os er der karneval i februar.
translations.ja: 私たちの地域ではカーニバルは2月にある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition forming a locative prepositional phrase; governs dative.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural dative; object of the preposition 'Bei'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; used in the existential construction 'es gibt'.
Impersonal pronoun functioning as expletive/subject in 'es gibt'.
Common noun; accusative object of 'gibt' denoting what exists.
Fused preposition+article ('in' + 'dem'); governs a dative noun phrase indicating time.
Proper noun (month name); object of the preposition 'im'.

Au carnaval, il porte toujours un masque.
Chez nous, le carnaval est en février.

Mijn zus naait kostuums voor carnaval.
